otel_spot_checks.result: Resource attributes aho.iteration=0.2.16, aho.workstream=W0, aho.role=drafter present on metrics including claude_code.session.count and claude_code.cost.usage.
Resource attributes preserved. Log records for api_request and tool_result carry correct attributes. prompt.id (UUID v4) and session.id are visible.

AF001.description: Verification of W0 gate confirmed Qwen Producer substrate fix. content_chars=2705 well above 500 threshold; eval_count=2828 shows significant headroom under 8000 cap. Thinking process (9181 chars) remains the dominant token consumer for complex cascade prompts.

AF002.description: Acceptance archive's finding F-W0-004 honestly captures the fourth recurrence of the checkpoint corruption bug and the three iterations required for the fix. Auditor confirms .aho-checkpoint.json was intact after the final W0 test run.

AF003.description: Pillar 11 monitoring (alerting) implementation confirmed as W3 scope; W0 successfully established the capture surface for these metrics.
